MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-26-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KAREN FLAGG'S MOTION TO CHANGE PLACE OF TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2012. THE COURT WAS PROVIDED WITH A COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THIS MORNING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KAREN FLAGG'S MOTION TO CHANGE PLACE OF TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE CONVENIENCE OF THE WITNESSES WARRANTS THE TRANSFER OF THIS ACTION TO MONTEREY COUNTY AND FOR THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

ATTY. HUGO N. GERSTL OF GERSTL & HUDSON, TEL. NO. (831)649-0669 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT KAREN FLAGG'S Motion To Change Place Of Trial IS Granted. The convenience of the witnesses warrants the transfer of this action to Monterey County and for the interest of justice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
